title: Filtering subitems by status
excerpt:
Hi Guys, 
How can I filter out tasks with status done among subtask? I can do that for tasks, but can’t for subtasks.

posts.author: olek (Olek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,

How can I filter out tasks with status done among subtask? I can do that for tasks, but can’t for subtasks.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, @olek - Welcome to the community! Subtasks / subitems are still a relatively new feature in monday. Filters are not fully implemented to account for all subtask requirements yet. There is a public roadmap for the subitems here: Subitems Product Plan

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Really need the ability to filter by subitems status in the advanced filters too!! @monday-team.
Do you have an estimation for when this feature mught become available?
Thanks!!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
